title: nervilia multinervis
intro: Nervilia multinervis, also known as the multiflora or many-nerved nervilia, is a species of orchid native to tropical Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe wounds and reduce swelling. The health benefits of Nervilia multinervis include its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, making it a valuable herb in folk medicine. Nervilia multinervis can be prepared as a decoction or infusion, and is also used in herbal remedies, such as tinctures and ointments.
